Bash(node -e "const XLSX = require\('xlsx'\); const wb = XLSX.readFile\('./server/COLORANTES PLAVICON.xlsx'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json\(wb.Sheets[wb.SheetNames[0]]\), null, 2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const XLSX = require\('xlsx'\); const wb = XLSX.readFile\('./server/COLORANTES PLAVICON.xlsx'\); const sheet = wb.Sheets[wb.SheetNames[0]]; const data = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json\(sheet\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(data, null, 2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const XLSX = require\('xlsx'\); const wb = XLSX.readFile\('./server/COLORANTES PLAVICON.xlsx'\); console.log\('Hojas:', wb.SheetNames\); wb.SheetNames.forEach\(sheet => { console.log\('\\n=== ' + sheet + ' ==='\); const data = XLSX.utils.sheet_to_json\(wb.Sheets[sheet]\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(data.slice\(0, 10\), null, 2\)\); }\)")
